title: Love Romance -Love Dawn-
overview: Yamamoto Luffy and Koyama Nami, two students who have bonded over their One Piece-esque names, meet Usopp, a mega fan of the series. Assuming everyone loves the manga as much as he does, he forcibly recruits them to his newfound "Pirate Club", naming Luffy as its "captain".

title: The Zoo
overview: Luffy, Nami, and Usopp visit a zoo. When a lion escapes its enclosure, Usopp uses it to help Luffy overcome his fear of animals, knocking the animal unconscious and saving the other visitors.

title: Versus!! The Biology Club
overview: After the Pirate Club takes an anatomical model from the Biology Club to create Brook, they are challenged to a Davy Back Fight in an attempt to reclaim him.

title: The Mosquito / Photo Editing App
overview: A series of short stories about the Pirate Club.

title: The Book-Book Fruit
overview: Usopp uses a "Buku Buku no Mi" device to send Nami, Tsuchi, and Toriko into the One Piece manga.
